title: International Weddings - Bridging Cultures with Better Together

intro.paragraph1: Roughly half of all the weddings we DJ as Better Together are international or binational – for us, that's simply everyday life, not a special case. We're both fluent in German and English, so nothing gets lost from your very first message to the dance floor. There are personal reasons behind this too: Jonathan lived in the USA and Canada for several years, and Vera lived in England – so we both bring our own international life experience to the table. Jonathan's DJ career even began exactly where cultures meet: his very first DJ experience was in front of an international audience from all over Europe.
intro.paragraph2: Our secret? In our in-depth pre-wedding call, we get to know not just you, but your musical worlds too. You send us songs that matter to you – which is especially helpful for cultures we haven't worked with yet – and we do our own research on top of that. Because there's a big difference between "the bride is from Thailand" and knowing that Korean music is hugely popular in Thailand. We experienced exactly that at one wedding: "Gangnam Style" had the crowd going wild – a moment that's only possible with real research. That's how we find songs both cultures know and love, from Punjabi MC to Stromae, while also deliberately creating moments that belong entirely to just one culture. For these moments we'll even pick up the microphone – something we rarely do otherwise – to invite all the guests to join in.
intro.paragraph3: Your guests have traveled halfway around the world for this one day – with familiar sounds from home, we make sure they still feel a little bit at home here in Germany.
intro.paragraph4: No experience yet with your particular cultural combination? Even more exciting! We love learning something new, together with you, and turn every new culture into a special experience for all your guests.

cta.convinced: Convinced? Let's have a no-obligation call – in German or English, whichever suits you best.

seo.title: International Weddings - DJ for Binational Couples | Better Together
seo.description: German-Moroccan, German-Venezuelan, or multilingual? Better Together brings your cultures together on the dance floor - as a DJ duo for international weddings in Berlin and Brandenburg.
seo.ogTitle: International Weddings with Better Together DJ
seo.ogDescription: We bridge cultures on the dance floor - DJ duo for international and binational weddings in Berlin and Brandenburg.
